element.hint: Define conditions in a human-readable format to filter records.
element.label: Condition Query
element.name: condition_query_display

element.hint: Choose the field from the source object that will be evaluated or aggregated.
element.label: Field
element.name: field

element.hint: System-generated encoded query used internally for filtering records. Modify only if you understand encoded query syntax.
element.label: Encoded Query
element.name: rule_condition_query

element.hint: Define whether the rule applies at an individual level or a grouped level.
element.label: Earning Level
element.name: earning_level

element.hint: Select the source data object (e.g., Salesforce Deal) on which this rule will run.
element.label: Source Object
element.name: source_object

element.hint: Enable or disable this rule. Only active rules will be executed.
element.label: Active
element.name: active

element.hint: Select how the field values should be calculated (e.g., Max, Min, Sum, Count).
element.label: Aggregation
element.name: aggregation

element.hint: Displays the associated plan under which this rule is created.
element.label: Plan
element.name: plan

element.hint: Enter a unique name for this rule to identify its purpose.
element.label: Rule Name
element.name: rule_name

element.hint: Provide a brief explanation of what this rule does and when it should be used.
element.label: Description
element.name: description
